Anthropic Claude","node_type":"generic","complexity":"medium","description":"Provides access to the Claude language model for generating and updating diagrams.","metadata":{},"children":[],"x":null,"y":null},{"id":"llm-openai-chat","label":"LLM Provider - OpenAI Chat","node_type":"generic","complexity":"medium","description":"Provides access to the OpenAI language model for generating and updating diagrams.","metadata":{},"children":[],"x":null,"y":null},{"id":"llm-ollama-local","label":"LLM Provider - Ollama (Local Model)","node_type":"generic","complexity":"medium","description":"Provides access to a local language model for generating and updating diagrams.","metadata":{},"children":[],"x":null,"y":null}],"x":null,"y":null},{"id":"libs-core-renderer","label":"Renderer","node_type":"generic","complexity":"low","description":"Converts DIR JSON into semantic SVG using a BFS topological layout engine.","metadata":{},"children":[],"x":null,"y":null},{"id":"libs-svgkit","label":"SVGKit Library","node_type":"generic","complexity":"high","description":"Post-processes generated SVG output by validating ARIA labels and enforcing semantic node IDs.","metadata":{},"children":[],"x":null,"y":null},{"id":"apps-cli-client","label":"Rust CLI Client","node_type":"generic","complexity":"low","description":"A thin HTTP client over the FastAPI server with generate and update subcommands.","metadata":{},"children":[],"x":null,"y":null},{"id":"jobs-worker-queue","label":"ARQ Async Worker - Redis Job Queue","node_type":"generic","complexity":"low","description":"Handles asynchronous job processing for diagram generation, decoupling LLM calls from HTTP requests.","metadata":{},"children":[],"x":null,"y":null}],"edges":[{"id":"apis-server-to-libs-core-pipeline-class","from_node":"apis-server","to_node":"libs-core-pipeline-class","label":"Request","complexity":"low","style":"solid","direction":"forward"},{"id":"libs-core-renderer-to-libs-svgkit","from_node":"libs-core-renderer","to_node":"libs-svgkit","label":"SVG Output","complexity":"high","style":"solid","direction":"forward"},{"id":"apis-server-to-apps-cli-client","from_node":"apis-server","to_node":"apps-cli-client","label":"HTTP Request/Response","complexity":"low","style":"dashed","direction":"bidirectional"},{"id":"libs-core-pipeline-class-to-jobs-worker-queue","from_node":"libs-core-pipeline-class","to_node":"jobs-worker-queue","label":"LLM Job Queue","complexity":"low","style":"dotted","direction":"forward"}],"groups":[{"id":"core-diagram-pipeline-components","label":"Core Diagram Pipeline Components","complexity":"low","contains":["apis-server","libs-core-pipeline-class","llm-anthropic-claude","llm-openai-chat","llm-ollama-local","libs-core-renderer"],"metadata":{}}]}

svg.title: Scheme Weaver Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: An AI diagramming pipeline consisting of a FastAPI server, core library for processing LLM outputs and rendering diagrams, SVGKit library for output validation, a Rust CLI client, an ARQ worker for asynchronous job generation, and a planned Nuxt web editor.

g.aria-label: LLM Job Queue: libs-core-pipeline-class to jobs-worker-queue
FastAPI Server: Provides two REST endpoints: POST /v1/generate and POST /v1/update.
Core Pipeline Class: Sends prompts to LLM providers and parses responses into DIR JSON format.
Renderer: Converts DIR JSON into semantic SVG using a BFS topological layout engine.
SVGKit Library: Post-processes generated SVG output by validating ARIA labels and enforcing semantic node IDs.
Rust CLI Client: A thin HTTP client over the FastAPI server with generate and update subcommands.
ARQ Async Worker - Redis Job Queue: Handles asynchronous job processing for diagram generation, decoupling LLM calls from HTTP requests.
g.text: ARQ Async Worker - Redis Job Queue
